description: A traditional Kashmiri lamb curry slow-cooked with aromatic spices, known for its deep red color and rich flavor, and is a signature dish of the Wazwan feast.
Minced mutton meatballs cooked in a creamy yogurt-based gravy and traditionally served as the ceremonial final dish of the Kashmiri Wazwan meal.
Fragrant basmati rice prepared with mild spices, saffron, and dry fruits, offering a subtly sweet flavor profile characteristic of Kashmiri cuisine.
